response.overview: Reserve 107: A Path Forward presents a major update of the Young Chippewayan saga.  This new documentary shares the on-going story of the Young Chippewayan band / Stoney Knoll First Nation as they work with Mennonites and Lutherans to right the wrongs of the past.  Since the release of the original documentary in 2016, there have been some significant advances in the story, including visits to Ottawa, the development of the Stoney Knoll Interpretive Site, and repeated gatherings at this sacred meeting place. This 2025 sequel offers heart-filled inspiration and a thought-provoking model for other communities across Turtle Island / North America who want to pursue the hard work of truth-telling and reconciliation.
response.title: Reserve 107: A Path Forward
